description: BIP276 network and version fields are 2-digit hex values (00–FF). The go-sdk pre-fix used a regex pattern '\d{2}' that only matched decimal digits [0-9], rejecting any BIP276 string whose network or version byte contained a hex letter (A-F). Additionally, parsing used strconv.Atoi() (base-10) instead of ParseInt(base-16), and the network/version struct fields were assigned in reverse order.

regression.symptom: DecodeBIP276 returned a regex mismatch error for any BIP276 string with hex digits A-F in the network or version position (e.g. network=0xFF, version=0xAA)
regression.root_cause: Three bugs: (1) regex used \d{2} instead of [0-9A-Fa-f]{2}; (2) strconv.Atoi used instead of ParseInt(s, 16, 64); (3) network and version struct fields assigned in reversed order

vectors.description: Decode BIP276 with network=0xFF (255) — must not reject hex letter 'f'
vectors.skip_reason: Go-SDK-specific regression (go-sdk#286): TS SDK does not expose a DecodeBIP276 function in the same module; this vector exercises Go-only code paths fixed in go-sdk v1.2.19. No TS dispatcher path exists for 'DecodeBIP276' operations.
vectors.notes: network=0xFF (first 2 hex chars after colon), version=0x01. Pre-fix regex rejected 'ff' because \d{2} does not match hex letters. Checksum 'ad3ca5e1' is illustrative — implementations must verify the real checksum from EncodeBIP276.

vectors.description: Decode BIP276 with version=0xAA (170) — must parse 'aa' as hex 170 not fail
vectors.skip_reason: Go-SDK-specific regression (go-sdk#286): TS SDK does not expose a DecodeBIP276 function in the same module; this vector exercises Go-only code paths fixed in go-sdk v1.2.19. No TS dispatcher path exists for 'DecodeBIP276' operations.
vectors.notes: version=0xAA (second 2 hex chars). Pre-fix: (1) regex rejected 'aa'; (2) even if accepted, Atoi('aa') would panic; (3) fields would be swapped. Marked intended: Go-SDK-only bug, TS SDK does not implement BIP276 in the same module.

vectors.description: Encode then decode round-trip for network=0x01, version=0x01 (all decimal digits) must succeed
vectors.skip_reason: Go-SDK-specific regression (go-sdk#286): TS SDK does not expose EncodeBIP276/DecodeBIP276 functions matching this round-trip contract; these operations map only to Go-SDK code paths. No TS dispatcher path exists.
vectors.notes: Control case: all-numeric hex values must survive round-trip even after the regex fix. This was working before the fix and must remain so.
